channel.title: World - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Sri Lanka recovers 87 bodies from Iranian warship sunk off its coast by a US submarine - AP News
item.description:
1. Sri Lanka recovers 87 bodies from Iranian warship sunk off its coast by a US submarine  AP News
  2. U.S. Submarine Launches Its First Torpedo in Combat Since World War II  The New York Times
  3. "Guest Of India Struck In International Waters": Iran On US Submarine Attack  NDTV
  4. Oil slick, life rafts, dozens of bodies: What Sri Lankan navy found after US sank Iranian warship  Fox News
  5. IRIS Dena was not 'India's guest' after leaving on Feb 25: Govt sources| India News  Hindustan Times

item.title: Israel's president says it's "about time that everybody tells Iran, 'Guys, we're fed up,'" as he lays out goals for war - CBS News
item.description:
1. Israel's president says it's "about time that everybody tells Iran, 'Guys, we're fed up,'" as he lays out goals for war  CBS News
  2. Isaac Herzog: 'Israel does not drag America into war'  Middle East Eye
  3. 🚨🇮🇱 Israeli President Isaac Herzog on the Iran war not being popular in America: "Usually people do not know the intricacies" He calls it a "unique," "focused" war that can bring "real change in the Middle East."  x.com
  4. Herzog hands out Purim packages to war wounded  JNS.org
  5. Israel does not dictate to President Trump anything, and Israel does not drag America into a war, says Herzog  Apa.az

item.title: US may not have capacity to take down full barrage of Iranian drones, officials warn - The Guardian
item.description:
1. US may not have capacity to take down full barrage of Iranian drones, officials warn  The Guardian

  3. What to Know About Iran’s Drones, Which Are Cheap to Launch but Expensive to Intercept  The New York Times
  4. Iran’s drone swarm attacks unleash ‘exponential costs’ on US, prolonging war: 'Asymmetric capability'  Fox News
  5. Iran could disrupt the Strait of Hormuz with drones for months  Reuters

item.description:

item.title: Global sea levels have been underestimated due to poor modelling, research suggests - The Guardian
item.description:

item.title: Congress once fought to limit a president’s war powers − more than 50 years later, its successors are less willing to assert their authority - The Conversation
item.description:
